originalTitle: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
title: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
content: Biniam Solomon was known for his witty and critical cartoons before the free press was closed.

content: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.

title: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
content: "Violence and fear" will spike and "equality and non-discrimination" will be trampled on, warn critics.

title: Taiwan cheering row overshadows China quarterfinal at Asian Cup
content: Taiwan face China in a tense Women's Asian Cup football quarterfinal, where political tensions will be at the fore.

title: How will the war on Iran impact the US economy?

title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election

originalTitle: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
title: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
content: Fake dealerships were manipulating the state vehicle licensing agency's official records, France's auditor has found.

title: 'Not appropriate' for Iran to be at World Cup - Trump
content: US president Donald Trump says Iran are "welcome" at the 2026 World Cup but it is not "appropriate" for them to be there.

originalTitle: Rangers 'unequivocally condemn' Old Firm fan disorder
title: Rangers 'unequivocally condemn' Old Firm fan disorder
content: Rangers say they "unequivocally" condemn Sunday's "unacceptable" Old Firm fan disorder and they support the Scottish FA launching an independent review of the Scottish Cup quarter-final with Celtic at Ibrox.
